creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
mod_perl-1.19 is referred to in this port - it is not available in
any of the sites listed in the makefile anymore, though.  mod_perl-1.21
seems to work compile fine if I change
DISTNAME=	mod_perl-1.19
to
DISTNAME=	mod_perl-1.21
and compile with no checksums.
I haven't installed/run this, because I have an httpd server already,
but it should be easy to update...

Fix: 

Change the mod_perl version number to 1.21
How-To-Repeat: Try to make p5-Apache from the current ports when you don't have
mod_perl-1.21 in /usr/ports/distfiles
